---
title: "Schedule"
author: "SciLifeLab Training Hub"
date: "2025-05-14"
---

<br>

##### Wednesday 14 May 2025

| Time | Session |
|------|------|
| 09:00 - 10:15 | [Open Science foundations](module1.qmd) |
| 10:15 - 10:45 | Coffee break |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | [Sharing, publishing, and reuse](module2.qmd) |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch |
: {tbl-colwidths="[25,75]"} 

<br/>
     
##### Thursday 15 May 2025

| Time | Topic |
|------|------|
| 09:00 - 10:30 | Group discussion: applying Open Science locally |
| 10:30 - 12:00 | Wrap-up and action planning |
: {tbl-colwidths="[25,75]"}
